name: daily-fresh fetch: first plugin invocation each calendar day triggers an auto-refresh attempt for stale daily sources (per S-13 + S-17)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-12T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --check-first-use-of-day --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" 2>out.txt && grep "first use of day" out.txt 1>&2 && grep "auto-refresh" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
